description:
HABROMANIA Alice in Wonderland indie game animation / animatic / storyboard of Cordelia and Charlie. I love animating these two and their toxic, terrible, goofy ahh relationship. This was originally just going to be a quick warm up animation but it got out of hand... I think all the bridgerton rewatches are going to my head. For their backstory and more HABROMANIA content go to my Instagram @symphony_sonata !

Thanks so much for watching and the love y'all!
fulltitle: I WON'T SAY I'M IN LOVE ANIMATION - Queen of Hearts and the Mad Hatter
